title: ludwigia lagunae
intro: Ludwigia lagunae, also known as water primrose, is a species of aquatic plant that belongs to the family Onagraceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ludwigia lagunae include its ability to support liver function, reduce oxidative stress, and exhibit potential anti-cancer properties. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and stems are typically dried and used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
